summary: Fixed VARS stuck on loading: VarsPanel used setInterval so a new fetch started every 1s while prior resolve_all could take >1s; stale completions skipped finally and never cleared initialLoading. Replaced with serialized poll (next tick only after prior fetch completes) and client AbortController 22s timeout. Backend: asyncio.wait_for 25s on resolve_all and resolve_global_live_variables with HTTP 504 on timeout.
current_status: VARS should clear loading and show timeout errors instead of spinning forever.
